positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a roaring celestial fox (kitsune) incorporated with geometric constellations and nebula patterns. The fox should be in a dynamic, elegant silhouette, composed with strong, contrasting black ink lines against a deep indigo and cosmic teal background. The style is a blend of Art Deco symmetry and modern spiritual tattoo design, emphasizing clean lines and negative space. The composition must be centered, suitable for a circular chest print, with intricate linework filling the space without becoming cluttered. Use high contrast, cross-hatching, and negative space to create depth. Cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, vector illustration, print-ready, clean lines, graphic design.
